subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-06
subcodes.first_line: Afflictions and troubles are due to the state of not being content with what God has ordained for you. If one submits himself to God he is happy
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @free will and predestination; fate, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
